attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_EARLY_BUILD_DATA)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.BUILD_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.START_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ERROR_MSG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT,
 (
 select BUILD_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT
 minus
 select BUILD_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_EARLY_BUILD_DATA
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BUILD_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.BUILD_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_ERLY_BUILD_DT.REFRESH_DATETIME
